programme.title: One Good Turn Deserves Another
programme.desc: When Hok Yee hires Bo Sek as her defence lawyer in a murder case, little does Bo Sek suspect that she has a dangerous personal agenda.

programme.title: Colourful Life
programme.desc: Already struggling with the loss of their parents, the Cheng Family now faces more hardship after offending some government officials, with the fourth son in danger for knowing a secret.

programme.title: AI Romantic
programme.desc: Best Actress Ali Lee stars as Bo, a high-end AI robot who switches on her self-learning function. Soon, she begins to experience myriad human emotions and develops feelings for her master.

programme.title: Almost Paradise S1
programme.desc: Alex races to save his daughter when his old partner comes to town to finish the job he started.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Moneyball S1
programme.desc: Ian Wright presents the game show where the difference between winning life-changing money and going home with nothing rests entirely on the roll of a ball.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Euromaxx
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Food Tales S1
programme.desc: Food Tales explores the incredible life stories of Singapore's local hawker heroes featured in the annual food and music extravaganza: GastroBeats. With a diverse mix of influences stemming from waves of immigration to a tiny island, Singapore's culinary landscape represents the beating heart of the nation.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Lionel Messi is set to break records in 2026, Japan are aiming to reach the QF for the first time, and we look at the successful CONCACAF bid.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Power Rangers Dino Fury S29
programme.desc: When an army of powerful alien beings are unleashed on Earth, threatening life as we know it, a brand-new team of Power Rangers, fueled by the pre-historic power of the dinosaurs, are recruited to deal with the threat.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: Cherry's new lemonade stand is hugely popular in Ollipolis. So popular that it attracts competition from The Imp! Can the trio stop The Imp from sabotaging their business and stealing Cherry's secret formula? Ollie is filming his first ever internet art video for all his fans and he's nervous. He doesn't think he's Internet-worthy. But when a mysterious hairdresser shows up to give Ollie a star makeover, will that be the end of Ollie's art video...

programme.desc: Join Pinkfong and friends for more fun and adventure.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1
programme.desc: While they are forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway order, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr1
programme.desc: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun. The game goes on, until Bluey runs away with Judo, leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken, and for Bluey, she needs to make amends.

programme.title: 123 Number Squad S2
programme.desc: Captain Redbeards coins have gone missing. Maurice doesn't know how many there were or where they could be. Can the Number Squad help him? Maurice has decided to build a workshop to work in but he's not very good with numbers or shapes. The Number Squad are on hand to help him out!

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures

But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal

Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

Walaupun tidak berminat untuk berkahwin pada usia muda, Imam merupakan seorang anak yang baik dan menuruti permintaan ibunya. Imam berkenalan dan jatuh cinta dengan Naira, seorang pemain biola yang tinggal di rumah perlindungan kanak-kanak jalanan. Namun, ibunya tidak merestui hubungan itu kerana Naira bekerja di kelab malam. Lakonan : Syakir Daulay, Rayisa Nayla Salwa, Vonny Felicia, Cut Mini Theo, Lukman Sardin dan Arif Brata.

programme.title: Boboiboy Movie 2
programme.desc: Boboiboy sedang diburu oleh musuh purba bernama Retak’ka yang ingin merampas kuasa Boboiboy untuk tujuan jahat. Boboiboy dan kawan-kawannya diserang Retak’ka, pengguna asal Kuasa Elemental yang dimiliki oleh Boboiboy. Retak’ka ingin merampas semula Kuasa Elemental daripada Boboiboy untuk menjadi makhluk paling kuat dan menguasai galaksi.

Namun, ibunya tidak merestui hubungan itu kerana Naira bekerja di kelab malam. Lakonan : Syakir Daulay, Rayisa Nayla Salwa, Vonny Felicia, Cut Mini Theo, Lukman Sardin dan Arif Brata.

programme.title: Virus Konsumer
programme.desc: Anda pernah menjadi mangsa sendiket penipuan? Virus Konsumer akan mendapatkan pandangan dan ulasan daripada pihak berwajib dan badan berkanun memberikan penyelesaian dan panduan kepada pengguna yang pernah menjadi mangsa. Episod ini mengupas tentang sindiket touting atau nama lainnya, ulat mahkamah. Segmen lakonan semula memaparkan kisah Siva (bukan nama sebenar) yang menjadi mangsa sindiket yang menjanjikan penyelesaian kepada kes kemalangannya.

programme.desc: Anak-anak adalah merupakan aset masa hadapan. Seperti kanvas yang putih bersih, pendidikan akan menjadi salah satu corak yang penting dalam kehidupan mereka. Generasi Kanvas membawakan kisah-kisah pelajar terpilih dalam menelusuri sistem pendidikan negara yang mempunyai pelbagai cabang dan opsyen. programme.title: Katalog
programme.desc: Dokumentari ini akan memaparkan cara pembuatan pelbagai produk yang dilihat dan digunakan sehari-hari tetapi mungkin lebih jarang dipertonjolkan. Dalam episod ini, kita selusuri penghasilan ambulans yang bukan bertujuan untuk mendapatkan keuntungan tetapi untuk ia merupakan suatu usaha murni untuk menyelamatkan nyawa. Bermula dengan bimbingan awal yang diterima dari luar negara, penghasilan ambulans pada hari ini adalah hasil kerja-kerja penyelidikan dan pembangunan serta usaha keras usahawan tempatan sendiri. Selain ambulans, kita juga akan melihat bagaimana van jenazah dihasilkan hasil adaptasi daripada pembuatan ambulans itu sendiri.

programme.title: Etika Fesyen & Tema
programme.desc: Di zaman OOTD, fesyen merupakan fokus utama sama ada di dunia nyata dan dunia maya. Etika Fesyen & Tema membawakan perincian asal-usul tema fesyen, perkembangannya serta pantang larang dalam menggayakan satu-satu tema pakaian. programme.title: Ibrah Ibrahim
programme.desc: Sebuah dokumentari yang akan memaparkan kisah benar masyarakat bertemakan konsep pengorbanan dalam sambutan Aidiladha. Kisah-kisah tersebut akan diinspirasikan dari kisah dan peristiwa penting melibatkan Nabi Ibrahim AS, puteranya Nabi Ismail AS dan dua isterinya Siti Hajar dan Siti Sarah.

programme.title: Ikhtilaf - Rahmat Berbeza Pendapat
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang akan mendekati 4 mazhab yang terkenal dalam sejarah peradaban dan tamadun Islam dulu hingga sekarang. Kembara untuk episod kali ini hos berada di Universiti Al Azhar. Episod kali ini hos dan penyelidik akan membicarakan tentang sembelihan. Perbincangan mengenai syariat penyembelihan dan perbahasan dalam setiap mazhab oleh ulama di Mesir dan di tanah air.

programme.title: Haji Dulu-Dulu
programme.desc: Haji Dulu-Dulu mengimbau kenangan dengan memaparkan bagaimana masyarakat Islam di Malaysia menunaikan haji pada zaman dahulu. Bersama tetamu Dr. Aiza Maslan (Pensyarah / Pengkaji, Pusat Ilmu Kemanusiaan Universiti Sains Malaysia), Mohd Fitri Ibrahim (Pengurus Besar Yayasan Islam Pulau Pinang (YIPP)), Dato' Sri Kamarudin Mat Ali (Mantan CEO Tabung Haji) dan Syed Salim Syed Ali Almufathal (Anak Syeikh Haji Pulau Pinang) menceritakan kelainan menyempurnakan ibadah haji pada zaman dahulu.

programme.title: Dunia 10
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita luar negara.

programme.title: The Tashriq Day
programme.desc: The Tashriq Day is the pinnacle of celebration in Islam following the pilgrimage. Observed all across the country, it is a day of blessings and rewards for Muslims. This documentary shows the differences in celebration in urban and rural settings. In this episode, the concept of Tashriq Days is explained by Mohd Nadzri Mustakim (National Mosque Imam). The Tashriq Day traveled to Kampung Kangkong, Pasir Mas, Kelantan to follow the preparations and celebrations of the Aidiladha with Imam Zulkifli Yahya (Kampung Kangkong's Imam), Mohd Asri Awang (Community Leader), Nik Mat Mahmood (Penghulu Mukim) and Razlan Mohamad (Kampung Kangkong's Qurban Programme Manager).

programme.title: i-Kadazan
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita dalam bahasa etnik Kadazan.

programme.title: i-Iban
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita di Sarawak dalam bahasa etnik Iban.

programme.title: What Say You
programme.desc: Program bicarawara berbahasa Mandarin membicarakan mengenai komuniti Cina di Malaysia.

programme.title: Berita Mandarin
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita dalam dan luar negara berbahasa Mandarin.

programme.title: World Today
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita dalam dan luar negara berbahasa Inggeris.

programme.title: Berita Tengah Hari
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita dalam dan luar negara, berita sukan dan berita hiburan.

programme.title: Juang Demi Jannah
programme.desc: Kehidupan sebagai Orang Kelainan Upaya (OKU) sudah tentunya penuh liku dan cabaran yang berbeza. Namun, kekurangan ini bukanlah alasan untuk mereka berserah kepada takdir. Juang Demi Jannah memaparkan semangat dan pengorbanan yang dilalui oleh golongan ini dalam menjalani kehidupan seharian mereka. Episod kali ini memaparkan kehidupan Ambar Aisyah Murugasoo, seorang OKU Penglihatan dan Radin Daniel, seorang OKU Fizikal yang dibantu oleh Hidayah Foundation Centre.

programme.title: i-Bajau
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita dalam bahasa etnik Bajau.

programme.title: My Wira
programme.desc: My Wira membawakan kisah-kisah wira pekerjaan unik yang sering tidak dipandang sebagai laluan kerjaya.

programme.title: Undang-Undang Hak Anda
programme.desc: Undang-Undang Hak Anda membincangkan hak-hak yang dilindungi dalam undang-undang Malaysia. Bersama Fikry Ibrahim dan Najwa Aqila bersama tetamu jemputan membincangkan tajuk Senjata Mempertahankan Diri.

programme.title: Berita Semasa
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita semasa dan terkini.

programme.title: Cuit Sikit Jangan Sentap
programme.desc: Cuit Sikit Jangan Sentap sebuah rancangan bual bicara secara langsung yang memberi tumpuan kepada isu-isu generasi muda serta menyentuh nilai-nilai murni dan kerohanian.

programme.title: Berita Semasa
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita semasa dan terkini.

programme.title: Inovasi Untuk Alam
programme.desc: Bersama hos, Shazwani Mohamad Shakeri melihat tenaga pakar tempatan membangunkan inovasi demi menjaga kelestarian alam dan pembangunan teknologi hijau. Episod pada kali ini membawakan tentang Solar Bidor.

programme.title: Biz Malaysia
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita ekonomi, korporat dan perniagaan serta laporan saham.

programme.title: Berita Wilayah
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita dari negeri-negeri di seluruh negara.

programme.title: Haji Dulu-Dulu
programme.desc: Haji Dulu-Dulu mengimbau kenangan dengan memaparkan bagaimana masyarakat Islam di Malaysia menunaikan haji pada zaman dahulu. Bersama tetamu Dr. Aiza Maslan (Pensyarah / Pengkaji, Pusat Ilmu Kemanusiaan Universiti Sains Malaysia), Mohd Fitri Ibrahim (Pengurus Besar Yayasan Islam Pulau Pinang (YIPP)), Dato' Sri Kamarudin Mat Ali (Mantan CEO Tabung Haji) dan Syed Salim Syed Ali Almufathal (Anak Syeikh Haji Pulau Pinang) menceritakan kelainan menyempurnakan Ibadah Haji pada zaman dahulu.

programme.title: Berita Mandarin
programme.desc: Memaparkan perkembangan berita dalam dan luar negara berbahasa Mandarin.

programme.title: Kembara Alam Borneo
programme.desc: Bersama Razzuan Rosli, Pengacara Kembara Alam Borneo, mengupas keunikan Borneo yang terkenal dengan kepelbagaian kaum dan adat tempatan. Episod kali ini membawa Razzuan ke Ba'kelalan mengenali suku kaum Lun Bawang yang menetap di Kampung Buduk Nur.

programme.title: On The Table (OTT)
programme.desc: 'On The Table' is a talk show that explores a range of topics, emphasizing Malaysia's current issues and trends. It also seeks to position Malaysia as an appealing investment and business hub for foreign investors, featuring insights from opinion leaders and influential figures.

programme.title: World Around Us
programme.desc: World Around Us is a compilation news program, which brings together content material in the form of features and human interest from ASEAN countries and around the world.

programme.title: Behind The Mic
programme.desc: 'Behind The Mic' is an interview program by a radio channel broadcast to a television platform that discusses a wide range of current issues both locally and internationally, including culture, health, education, and much more. In addition to featuring prominent and influential personalities, the show also explores key topics that impact global society. Each episode offers in-depth insights from special guests who are experts in their fields, providing viewers with an opportunity to gain a broader perspective on the world around them.

programme.title: Global Voices
programme.desc: 'Global Voices' is a mixed-slot program featuring a blend of engaging content, including both previously aired shows and fresh new programs that resonate with a global audience. Focusing on current issues, culture, technology, and international harmony, Global Voices aims to connect viewers with a broader perspective of the world. The program also offers inspiring stories and discussions from diverse cultural backgrounds, bringing audiences closer to the realities of our increasingly interconnected global community.

Fatihah bertindak meninggalkan rumah kerana tidak mahu dikongkong dan tetap ingin meneruskan minatnya untuk menyanyi. programme.desc: Kelan kembali menyertai Unit Jenayah Besar demi menegakkan keadilan. Sementara itu, Rijin dan Dingqin melawat pembunuh bersiri Lin Gangsheng di penjara untuk penulisan buku, manakala Kelan menyedari tarikh lahirnya sama dengan Dingqin.

programme.title: TILL THE END OF THE MOON
programme.desc: Li Susu adalah anak perempuan ketua puak Hengyang dari dunia abadi. Ayahnya dan seluruh puak itu telah dibunuh oleh raja iblis, Tan Tai Jin. Li harus menyelamatkan alam dunia daripada kemusnahan raja iblis.

programme.title: TILL THE END OF THE MOON
programme.desc: Xiwu yang berkahwin dengan Tan Tai Jin, sebenarnya anak perempuan kedua Jeneral Ye di kerajaan Sheng. Dia dikenali sebagai seorang perempuan jahat yang melayan Tai Jin secara kejam sehingga dipandang rendah oleh orang bawahan.

programme.title: TREASURE HUNT IN MALAYSIA 3
programme.desc: Episod ini dua hos bersama tetamu jemputan bersaing dalam pelbagai sukan air di Asian Water Sports Village, Puchong. Antara cabarannya termasuk berkanu dan ujian ketangkasan sebelum pasangan Gary dan Di Fei dinobatkan sebagai pemenang.

programme.title: MY ONE AND ONLY

programme.title: YES! NIGHT MARKET
programme.desc: Episod ini tiga orang hos dibantu oleh selebriti jemputan akan menjual "tofu busuk" di pasar malam. Mereka harus membeli bahan mentah dan membuat tinjauan di merata tempat untuk mempelajari cara menyediakan menu tersebut.

programme.title: HEALING HEROES
programme.desc: Cai Ruan yang terserempak dengan Megan di sebuah taman memaksa dia berjumpa doktor. Megan kelihatan tidak sihat dan sentiasa mengadu sakit perut. You Xiao memberanikan diri untuk mengakui perasaannya kepada Ren Hui.

programme.title: HEALING HEROES
programme.desc: You Xiao mengalami pendarahan dalaman dan terpaksa menjalani pembedahan lagi untuk membuang darah beku. Hao Nan mendapati ibunya mengalami kemurungan. Jia Cai membawa Suk Fen untuk membeli sebuah rumah baharu untuk Qiu Yan.

programme.title: PROUD OF YOU
programme.desc: Jialiang terserempak dengan Wenling dan Ziting di restoran. Jialiang hanya beri petunjuk kepada mereka tentang keberadaan Zixian tapi enggan mendedahkan apa-apa. San Hao terlambat untuk perbincangan bisnes baharu dengan pengarah Kok.

programme.title: RING A BELL

programme.title: PROJECT LOVE

programme.desc: Neo mendapati program Adam telah diaktifkan pada pelayan syarikat, memaksa Cheng Cheng menyembunyikannya. Di tengah kemelut itu, Adam meluahkan perasaannya kepada Cheng Cheng sebelum mereka dikejutkan dengan kedatangan Neo.

programme.title: MANDARIN NEWS
programme.desc: MANDARIN NEWS.

programme.title: TAIWAN DEKAT JE
programme.desc: Episod ini Pengacara 8TV, Wang Jing Yi, mengimbau jelajah lapan hari di Taiwan bersama pemandu pelancong, Kenji. Mereka berkongsi tentang keindahan alam, budaya tempatan, serta keunikan kulinari seperti tofu busuk dan teh susu mutiara.

programme.title: WOW SHOP
programme.desc: WOW SHOP.

programme.title: WEAVING A TALE OF LOVE
programme.desc: Pei Xingjian dan Liu Li baru berkahwin. Puteri Linhai adalah puteri sulung kepada Maharaja tetapi memusuhi keluarga Pei. Tanpa persetujuan Pei Xingjian, dia menghantar Yu Nu, bekas isteri Xingjian sebagai pembantu rumahnya.

programme.title: WEAVING A TALE OF LOVE
programme.desc: Puteri Linhai sengaja mendedahkan kepada Liu Li siapa bekas isteri Xingjian. Puteri Linhai juga memberitahu Li Liu bahawa dia sudah mengatur adik perempuan tirinya San Wu untuk mengahwini anaknya sebagai gundik.

programme.title: New Tales of the Flying Fox
programme.desc: In a great rendition of The Silver Fox and Legend of the Fox comes this exciting adventure, where the only thing between the clan leaders and certain death is Hui Ying-hung.

programme.title: The Lark
programme.desc: Sixties pop star Carrie Ku plays the "Little Lark" in this romantic-drama of mistaken identity that is a treasure trove of some of the most popular Mandarin songs of all time.

programme.title: The Savage Five
programme.desc: A group of bandits flees with a stolen safe to a village where they oppress the villagers and force the blacksmith Wei to unlock the safe. Wei refuses and flees to report to officials, while heroes of the town emerge to fight the bandits.

programme.title: The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: This side-splitting comedy sees naive Ah Niu headed to Hong Kong, where he is repeatedly exploited and taken advantage of, and eventually finds himself arrested and imprisoned! Can he survive difficult times and finally overcome adversity?

programme.title: The Fastest Sword
programme.desc: Southern Swordsman Ting is named “The Fastest Sword” but is defeated by a street monk and has to fulfil his promise of working on stone craving with the monk for three years. Ting returns home to lead a peaceful life after that and declines all fight challenges. Even so, he is forced to fight the Northern Swordsman. Who will win finally?

programme.title: Tales of Larceny
programme.desc: Connecting all the antics of bosses, monks, beggars, and thieves is the slippery and sinuous efforts of three pickpockets so adept at their chosen skill that they can even trick three beauties of their underwear without missing a step.

programme.title: Lady Of The Law
programme.desc: Chan, the chief of Wan Sheng Escort, is forced to raise his opponent's son, Yim. While Chan forbids Yim to practice martial arts, Yim secretly learns it. Ten years later, a rapist appears and Yim is arrested by a lady constable as the suspect. The rapist turns out to be Chan's elder son and Yim is framed by the Chans. Can Yim prove his innocence?

programme.title: Return of the Phoenix
programme.desc: An imperial minister Cheng betroths his pretty younger daughter, Ye, to his friend's son, Mu. His wife however, refuses to let Ye marry before her elder daughter Yan, who is ugly and undesirable. Yan is asked to pretend as Ye to meet Mu but scares him away. A rich guy who likes Ye meanwhile pretends as Mu to attend the wedding...

programme.title: The Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: Fans of the international star Alexander Fu Sheng were aghast. Their idol had broken both his legs and was recuperating. Everyone wondered: would he be able to return to the action comedies for which he was so famous? This movie was the answer, and it left no doubt that he had made a full recovery. Liu Chia-yung, brother of preeminent martial arts moviemaker Liu Chia-liang, was famous in his own right for kung-fu comedies, and he out-did himself with this one. Imagine Bob Hope and Bing Crosby with the skills of Jet Li and Jackie Chan, and you've got an idea of the fun and fury inherent in this delightful tale of two con men vying for a horde of hidden gold. Add to the mix a Shaolin monk (played by "Master Killer" Gordon Liu Chia-hui), a powerfully brutal villain, and his equally dangerous mute sister (future director Yang Tsing-tsing), and you've got one of the most internationally loved kung-fu capers ever made.

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: A bandit became a warlord in northern China by helping Russia fight against Japan. Due to his ignorance and silly behaviour, he is seen as a joke to everyone. The warlord is finally killed by the daughter of a troupe master whom he had killed for no reason, bringing a befitting end to a traitor.

programme.title: The Flag of Iron
programme.desc: When super director Chang Cheh found new talent and blood with "The Five Venoms" actors, most of which were trained in the highly acrobatic Chinese opera and well versed with exotic martial arts weapons, this created a new spark for his use of bizarre weapons in his films. The Flag Of Iron is one of 20 movies that he directed featuring the utterly flabbergasting and physically exhausting action bits created by these five dudes. You have the good guys from the righteous clan versus the bad guys from the villainous clan and it's so filled with "don't-blink-or-you-will-miss-something" gags, you will need to watch it over and over again so you can see the things you missed.

programme.title: Moonlight Serenade
programme.desc: A sweet inn-keeper's daughter is witness to a perverted rape, leading to more danger than most romantic dramas can handle. Can her true love rescue her in time? For this movie, the moonlight serenade is the sound of suspense, leading to more danger than most romantic dramas can handle.

programme.title: The Thunderbolt Fist
programme.desc: A vicious Japanese judo expert wants to prove that Chinese are the “sick people of Asia” and sets out to sabotage and kill the best martial artists in dangerous tournaments. To save his son from this, the head of Ping Pai Boxing Institute sends him to the mountains to learn the powerful Thunderbolt Fist technique from master fighter, Red Butterfly.

programme.title: The Last Tempest
programme.desc: This sequel to The Empress Dowager continues the tale of Emperor Guangxu and Empress Dowager Cixi. Despite Guangxu's enthronement, his ability to rule effectively is overshadowed by the ever-present power of Cixi. When his attempts to reform the Imperial system are thwarted by the Empress Dowager, Guangxu attempts to curb her power.

programme.title: Five Superfighters
programme.desc: A kung fu master and his three students lost everything after they are floored by a bully. To take revenge, the students find ways to learn from other kung fu masters and come back six months later to have a rematch with the bully on their master's birthday.

programme.title: Apartment For Ladies
programme.desc: A Taiwanese singer comes to Hong Kong in search for her missing younger sister, who had arrived in Hong Kong to be discovered as a nightclub singer. She finds lodging at an apartment for women run by a man-hating landlady, Mrs Chan. However, Mrs Chan cannot confine the young ladies' youthful vitality within the apartment.

programme.title: Shaolin Rescuers
programme.desc: Hong Xi Guan of Shaolin is chased and wounded by a martial arts scum who took refuge in the Qing court. He is saved and healed by friends from the wet market and they hide Hong in a bean curd shop to protect him. However, Hong's enemy finds him and ambushes him at the shop, hoping to capture Hong and all his friends.

programme.title: Till the End of Time
programme.desc: Ming marries singer Ling, defying his wealthy father and severing family ties. When Ling becomes pregnant, Ming's overwork causes him to lose his sight. To support their home, Ling returns to the stage but Ming leaves to avoid becoming a burden. Encouraged by a friend, Ling performs again, and her song moves Ming to reunite with his wife and child.

programme.title: Martial Club
programme.desc: The young Wong Fei Hung and his friend Wang Yin Lin offend the young master of another rival school and the expert they hire, causing both martial arts schools to fight against each other. This is Director Liu Chia Liang's masterpiece and one of the top ten highest grossing movies in 1981.

programme.title: The Yellow Muffler
programme.desc: Japanese director Inoue Umetsugu takes on the glitzy world of nightclub performers in The Yellow Muffler. The film depicts the struggle of two singing sisters, Ching-ping (Irene Chen I-ling) and Pai-hung (Betty Ting Pei) and ends when they are cast in a new movie.

programme.title: Opium And The Kung-Fu Master
programme.desc: Tie Qiao San, head of the Ten Guangdong Tigers, is an honourable master with many disciples. As opium becomes popular among the nobles, Tie starts taking it and gradually harms his body. When an opium house's owner defeats Tie in a fight and he is only saved from being killed by his disciple, Tie vows to quit opium and get back on his feet.

programme.title: Crocodile River
programme.desc: This story has a Romeo and Juliet flavour. Two families who hate each other live across the opposite sides of a river filled with crocodiles and do not bother to have a bridge built. Their respective children meet in university and fall in love, but have to find ways to be together and resolve the hatred between their families.

programme.title: Heads For Sale
programme.desc: Hua is an upright and brave swordswoman who will stand up against villains and do anything for Luo, the man she loves. When Luo is sent to jail by the corrupted police, she sets out to free him and did not hesitate to chop off two bodyguards' heads. In the process, she also stumbles across an old enemy of her father who is back seeking revenge.

programme.title: The Female Prince
programme.desc: Hsiao's stepmother frames her fiancé Lung when he refuses to forfeit their engagement and sends him to prison. To save him, Hsiao disguises as Lung to take the Imperial exam and ranks first place. Impressed by Hsiao, the Emperor weds the Princess to 'him'. When Hsiao comes clean on their wedding night, she persuades the Princess to follow a plan….

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Liu serves his triad society loyally and tries to live a respectable life, but over time his good intentions lead him to an all-out gang war with a startling conclusion.

programme.title: Crazy Nuts Of Kung Fu
programme.desc: A roadside bandit and a traveling gambler team up to make money from gambling. In a successful attempt to steal a huge amount of money from a warlord's home, they encounter revolutionists who seek their help to fund the reform campaign. Will the two help the revolutionists' cause with the stolen money?

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Chan and his apprentice Fan transport zombies for a living and are hired to move nine zombies in one go. When two hop away, it is revealed that one is actually a man in disguise trying to escape his enemies. It turns out that both the disguised zombie and Chan are martial arts experts!

programme.title: Melody of Love
programme.desc: Three young doctors pursue three hard-to-get beauties in this romantic film set in the 70s “a-go-go” era. They have no idea where to start and use Rock-paper-scissor method to match themselves with the girls. The tactics and tricks they use are hilarious and they have to reshuffle their plans when nothing leads to success!

programme.title: Swordsman and Enchantress
programme.desc: The story happens in a martial arts world where everyone tries to obtain the "Deer Sword". Lian's wife is wounded in an ambush and his rival Xiao saves her. They escape to Xiao's home and he treats her poisonous wound. This leads Lian to suspect his wife's faithfulness and results in several blood-splattering duels with Xiao.

programme.title: The Snake Prince
programme.desc: The Snake Prince lives on the Snake Mountain of Kwangsi with other snakes and they have lived peacefully with humans for a thousand years. All things change however, when the Snake Prince falls in love with one of the three beauties performing a sensual rain dance in the nearby village one day, and decides to marry her at all costs...

programme.title: Ghosts Galore
programme.desc: Young Taoist priest Lu and his friend are nearly killed by a female ghost during an exorcism. Luckily, Master Lian saves their lives, so they beseech him to teach them his skills. When his friend is killed by ruthless ninjas, Lu decides to learn the ultimate witchcraft and teams up with his master to defeat them.

programme.title: The Venus' Tear Diamond
programme.desc: Legendary rival jewel thieves Fragrant Night and Nocturnal Earl travel to Japan to steal the famous Venus' Tear Diamond. They fall quickly in love at first sight, without knowing the other person is their rival and is after the same prize. Who will get the diamond, and will it mean the end of their new found love?

programme.title: Martial Arts of Shaolin
programme.desc: Zhi Ming, who trains at the Northern Shaolin Temple, teams up with Si Ma Yan, who trains at the Southern Shaolin Temple, to avenge both their fathers' death by assassinating a corrupt magistrate, leading to a series of fierce battles!

programme.title: The Lotus Lamp
programme.desc: Linda Lin Dai plays both mother and son in this lavish fable about a goddess who falls in love with a mortal scholar (Cheng Pei-pei in her debut role). Over two years in production, it was released on the first anniversary of Linda's tragic suicide.

programme.title: Return of the One-armed Swordsman
programme.desc: One-armed Swordsman Fang Kang wants to lead a quiet life with his wife, but when she is abducted by the Eight Demon Swordsmen clan, he is forced to take them on in order to save her.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him….

programme.title: The Imperial Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: The story revolves around a maverick, a band of woman warriors and a group of ruthless bandits. The maverick teams up with the woman warriors to battle the bandits seeking to raid the emperor's tomb.

programme.title: Love With The Perfect Stranger
programme.desc: After breaking up with his girlfriend, salesman Bao meets a rich girl, Jin Jin, who just broke up with her boyfriend. Two equally heartbroken strangers fall in love instantly and get married on impulse. The couple lives happily together until Jin Jin finds herself pregnant with her ex-boyfriend's baby...

programme.title: Perils Of The Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: Chu Liuxiang and the Eighth Prince stage a fake assassination attempt, allowing Chu to infiltrate Ghostly Manor as an undercover agent and eradicate this den of evil. The manor harbours notorious martial arts criminals and is rumoured to be haunted. Soon, during his investigation, Chu becomes entangled in a series of mysterious and eerie events.

programme.title: Between Tears and Smiles
programme.desc: Fan Jia Shu is a kind-hearted student who is smitten with Shen, a heart-rending love song singer. However, he is not the only one who has eyes for Shen. The General's henchmen are also determined to present the songstress to their superior as a gift. Fan receives help from an unexpected person just in time to save the woman he loves.

programme.title: Lion VS Lion
programme.desc: The traditional lion dance has never looked so good as in Lion VS Lion which captures the most impressive sequences of lion dancing on film. Besides being loaded with enjoyable martial arts chicanery, film historians can revel because it's also the first film that clearly demonstrates the intricacies and differences between the traditional Northern and Southern lion dancing techniques. The Five Venom alumnus and Chang Cheh discovery, Lo Meng, teams up with Liu Chia-liang protege Wang Yu, as they inadvertently turn from vagabond kung-fu school operators into anti-Ching, patriotic fighters.

programme.title: One-armed Swordsman
programme.desc: Accepted to the Golden Sword School after his father sacrificed his life to save his master, Fang Kang is resented by his fellow pupils and decides to leave. His master's daughter challenges him to a fight and cuts off his arm. Fang masters the art of sword fighting with one arm and finds himself returning to the School to save his master again.

programme.title: The Vengeful Beauty
programme.desc: The Flying Guillotine assassins are secretly working for the Emperor and its leader Jin is sent to kill Hon, who knows this secret. Hon's pregnant wife Rong seeks to kill Jin but retreats to protect her unborn child. When she is hunted down herself, Rong hooks up with a former Flying Guillotine member and her martial arts senior to fight back...

programme.title: The Hidden Power Of Dragon Sabre
programme.desc: Defeated villain Sung Ching Shu returns and starts a reign of terror, trapping a beautiful Mongolian Princess and mastering the "yin and yang combination" to become almost invincible. Only two swords held by two great swordsmen can stand in his way!

programme.title: The Mad Monk Strikes Again
programme.desc: The Mad Monk is up against the equally legendary scholar-turned-genie, Lu Tung Pin. The duo create havoc as they vie with each other, be it in mirth, magic, women or weapons!

programme.title: The Sword And The Lute
programme.desc: Gui Wu and his bride use the deadly weapon - Phoenix Lute to fight against evil, but the lute accidentally falls into the hands of bandits hoping to use it to take control of the province. Gui Wu must now fight to recover the lute and beat the bandits.

programme.title: The Grand Substitution
programme.desc: In this Opera epic, a loyal Imperial Court servant gives up his own newborn son to save the prince from an evil official.

programme.title: Little Dragon Maiden
programme.desc: Yang Guo and Xiao Long Nu are deeply in love and live harmoniously in the ancient tomb. Xiao Long Nu proposes marriage one day but Yang Guo declines. Heartbroken, she leaves without a word. Devastated by her absence, Yang Guo searches tirelessly for her. When they finally reunite, he begs her to marry him—only for her to refuse his proposal.

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Betty Ting plays Susan, a young woman hiding from her father by being a nightclub singer in Japan. Pop singer Chao Ke-jen (Lin Chong) gets permission from his boss to visit Japan, with the condition that he finds the boss's daughter. Boy finds girl, boy falls in love. But will the father approve?

programme.title: The Golden Lion
programme.desc: The Golden Lion is a bandit with good martial arts skills and often robs from the rich to help the poor. He is ambushed and attacked by a gang one night but luckily finds help from a master healer, who has to find a way to treat him while they are both being chased by the gang.

programme.title: The 5 Billion Dollar Legacy
programme.desc: A crippled billionaire mails a letter to each of his long-lost daughters inviting them to go to Japan, in the hope that he will find a worthy heir to inherit his vast fortune. The sisters finally meet abroad the plane to Japan, and one of them is taken with a man who is going to investigate the death of his lawyer uncle in a mysterious hit-and-run.

programme.title: The Deadly Duo
programme.desc: The prince of the Sung Dynasty is captured by the Chin invaders and guarded by top martial arts masters. Two powerful patriots need to fight the overwhelming odds and pull off the impossible: to rescue the royal Prince and get out of the Chin stronghold alive.

programme.title: The Pearl Phoenix
programme.desc: In Huangmei Opera tradition, this movie tells the love story of Wen, who sells himself as a slave to a rich family, and Huo, the family's young daughter. The lovers are kept apart by Huo's stepmother and Huo escapes by dressing up as a man. Wen is framed and put into jail so Huo has to go back and rescue her lover!

programme.title: Usurpers Of Emperor's Power
programme.desc: The last ruler of Tang, Li Yao is deposed by Chao Kuang-jun, the founder of the Sung Dynasty. Unfortunately his actions unleash a new plague - his brother Kuang-yi - on the courts and his people. The marauding Kuang-yi rapes and plunders. As more people get involved, it turns into a bloody battlefield of betrayal. It is up to upright officials like Li Lang to put an end to it. But can one man take on the imperial army?

programme.title: House of Traps
programme.desc: An evil prince has hidden the stolen imperial treasures in a house filled with booby-trapped blades. Amid plasma-spurting attacks, heroes and rogues try to uncover the deadly secrets of the house...

programme.title: Tropicana Interlude
programme.desc: Ping and Su are lovers who operate a travel agency specializing in Southeast Asian holidays. Tung, a school mistress, and her students join a guided tour lead by Ping. During the trip, a spoiled kid Li is attracted to Ping but Su thinks Ping has fallen for Tung and leaves. How will Ping deal with the situation and ends up happily back with Su?

programme.title: Disciples of the 36th Chamber
programme.desc: In the finale of this trilogy, Gordon Liu reprises his famous role, Monk San Te, as he tries to protect Fang Shih Yu, an arrogant youth who gets into trouble with the Qing officials, and nearly lands Shaolin Temple into trouble too.

programme.title: The Kingdom And The Beauty
programme.desc: Emperor Cheng Te meets country maiden Li Feng on a visit to Southern China. It was love at first sight and the Emperor leaves with a promise that Li Feng would be his empress. When he sends for Li one year later, she was too ill to withstand the arduous journey and arrives just in time to die in the arms of her beloved...

programme.title: Operation Lipstick
programme.desc: A professor's assistant stole a micro-film storing the secret of a newly invented nuclear reactor and sells it to a crime syndicate. However, the micro-film accidentally falls into the hands of a nightclub dancer and a thief in the process, leading to them being relentlessly pursued by the crime syndicate to retrieve the micro-film.

programme.title: The Blue and the Black
programme.desc: Set during the Japanese occupation in World War II, a young orphan Tang Qi falls in a love with a young man Chang. However, their love is filled with challenges, from family pressure to the turmoil of war. When Tang Qi was raped, she is expelled from home to become a nightclub singer and embarks on a journey of no return….

programme.title: Young Vagabond
programme.desc: Su Can, the carefree yet unruly eldest son of a winery owner, is forced to study under a tutor after being expelled from school. He soon discovers that his tutor is a martial arts master and becomes his disciple. However, when his family and master are slain by the ruthless bandit, Centipede, Su Can embarks on a perilous quest for revenge.

programme.title: Song Of Orchid Island
programme.desc: Dr. He moves to the remote Lanyu island off the coast of Taiwan to look for his long lost father, and starts to run a clinic curing islanders who are bitten by the fatal red worms there. He meets Ya Lan who works as a nurse in his clinic and falls in love with him. Things get vicious for Dr. He as a jealous islander plots to get rid of him….

programme.title: Legend Of The Fox
programme.desc: A young man, Chin, believes he is an orphan, until he meets three men and learns from them that his father was a great swordsman who was killed when he was trying to dispel rumors of a wrongdoing and return a lost sword to its rightful owner. Chin seeks out the men's help to take vengeance on the wrongful death of his father.

programme.title: The Dream Of The Red Chamber
programme.desc: Adapted from the great Chinese classic novel of the same name, the son of renowned Jia family, Bao Yu, is deeply in love with his cousin, Dai Yu. However, his mother disapproves of their relationship and plots to arrange Bao Yu to marry another rich girl, resulting in a tragic ending for the perfect couple.

programme.title: The Golden Knight
programme.desc: The heroine Yu Fei Xia is accused of stealing the book of martial arts secrets. To prove her innocence, she disguises herself as a man and finds her way into the Shaolin Temple to find out the truth….

programme.title: Mist Over Dream Lake
programme.desc: A young girl Chen is sent away by her parents who are going through divorce, to stay with the Chang's. On the Chang's farm, she meets their two sons, the youngest daughter and a young artist, and spends a summer with them that she will never forget.

programme.title: The Lady is the Boss
programme.desc: Wong Hsia Yuan is a traditional kung fu master whose academy is on the brink of closure. Chan Mei Ling arrives from U.S. to revitalize the academy but her way of recruiting students is going beyond questionably legal. Yuan is furious, but when the local triads enter the picture, Yuan and Ling join hands to take back the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Boxer Rebellion
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager Cixi believes the Boxers' claim that they have developed a kung fu that makes them impervious to weapons, thus declaring war against the alliances of eight foreign nations. The lack of weapons and good leadership in the Ching government allows the Eight Nation Alliances to take down Beijing.

programme.title: The Wandering Swordsman
programme.desc: The wandering swordsman Yu Hsieh Erh has formidable sword skills and helps the poor by robbing from thieves and distributing the wealth. He meets a group of bandits who are planning to rob a convoy escorting some valuables and is tricked into participating in the robbery. Yu soon realizes his folly and returns to take revenge on the bandits.

programme.title: Na Cha The Great
programme.desc: Adapted from a chapter of the classic Chinese legend “Investiture of the Gods”, this is the story of Na Cha set 3000 years ago. After Na Cha sacrificed his life to save his parents, he is reincarnated with his spirit embodied in a lotus flower and is armed with two magic weapons to save the people from their despotic emperor.

programme.title: The Naval Commandos
programme.desc: The Chinese Navy is attempting to defend its coastline from a Japanese attack, they send their commando unit led by Cui Hsia into the mainland to enlist help to thwart the Japanese before they attack. The commandos enlist the help of Song San and Shiao Liu to kill the Japanese officers led by Shan Mao and destroy their attacking ships.

programme.title: Sex, Love and Hate
programme.desc: This masterpiece spins three interconnected tales about Hong Kong society's differing views on love and what women want from love. Follow a trio of Hong Kong women as they explore relationships and fulfil their hopes of finding true love.

programme.title: Two Champions of Shaolin
programme.desc: Set in the Qing Dynasty, the Shaolin clan wants to overthrow Qing and restore the Ming Dynasty, while the Wudang clan is backed by the Qing government. The two renowned clans eventually set themselves up against each other, and a series of vicious fighting has just begun….

programme.title: Lovers Blades
programme.desc: The Lovers Blades, a pair of invincible weapons, are to be delivered to the Qing Emperor. However, they accidentally fell into the hands of Xiao Zhong Hui and Yuan Guan Nan, so Imperial Chief Zhuo Tian Xiong hunts them down for the blades. As the battle begins, the secret of the blades are also revealed.

programme.title: Swift Sword
programme.desc: A righteous swordsman, Bai Yi Pang, seeks revenge on an evil clan but is crippled after being beaten up by them. Years later, a young man encounters Bai who is hiding in a cave. Bai decides to teach this determined young man his Swift Sword skills so that he can help Bai take revenge on the evil clan.

programme.title: Whose Baby is in the Classroom?
programme.desc: Chen, a male teacher in an all girls' high school, is stuck with a baby that isn't his and must take care of it. As he lives on the school grounds, the baby is a source of constant distraction and worry! Luckily, his class warms to the baby and helps him take care of it while he works his charm on Li Ching, an uptight teacher in the same school.

programme.title: Shaolin Mantis
programme.desc: The Emperor orders Feng to find proofs of Master Tian's rebellion in his house. Feng falls in love with Tian's granddaughter and marries her. When he finds the proofs and tries to leave with her, his wife is killed in the fight against Tian. Feng creates the mantis-style martial arts and vows to avenge her death.

programme.title: Two Con Men
programme.desc: Two Con Men is a wonderfully twisted, pseudo-romantic comedy in the vein of "Robin Hood" meets "The Sting". Starring Liang Tien as Clever Chan and Chang Ying (who's done over 400 films) as Tricky Ching, it's the age-old competition between a rookie con artist versus the ultimate, experienced flimflam man. It's a game Chen cannot afford to lose, because people's lives - including his own, hang in the balance of good versus evil.

programme.title: Ambitious Kung Fu Girl
programme.desc: Si Si, a spoiled and naive rich girl with only basic kung fu training, becomes enchanted by the legends of the fearless hero Qin Ge. Determined to escape her father's arranged marriage, she disguises herself as a man and sets out to find him, hoping to challenge Qin Ge—only to be drawn into a deadly plot within the criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Story of Sue San
programme.desc: TIn this Huangmei Opera romance, Wang is the son of a respected government official whereas Sue San is a famous prostitute. Although they love each other and seem to be perfectly matched, the two are worlds apart when it comes to social ranking, which will prove hard to overcome...

programme.title: A Place to Call Home
programme.desc: Li Ching, star of Sweet is Revenge, plays one of three daughters, whose life is turned upside down when she discovers she is adopted. But things get even worse when she goes in search of her real mother. Finally, after what is almost a double tragedy, she realizes what so many knew all along: There's no place like home.

programme.title: The Golden Seal
programme.desc: Dai Tian Chou practices martial arts since young so he can avenge his father's death. He meets Wu Xiao Yan who is disguised as a man one day and is suddenly beaten by a group of gangsters. Wu begs her father to allow her to take Dai back home to recover. Little does Dai know this is his chance to take revenge.

programme.title: Police Force
programme.desc: A man joins the Hong Kong police force to track down a murderer who has killed his friend in a robbery. While he struggles to reconcile his law defending police duty with his desire for vengeance, he also has a new-found respect for the law.

programme.title: Crocodile River
programme.desc: This story has a Romeo and Juliet flavour. Two families who hate each other live across the opposite sides of a river filled with crocodiles and do not bother to have a bridge built. Their respective children meet in university and fall in love, but have to find ways to be together and resolve the hatred between their families.

programme.title: The Spirit of the Sword
programme.desc: Water Clan Chief is severely wounded by a samurai killer shortly before the annual duel at Tai Lake. He sends his brother Bao Yu on a long journey to find an antidote for him. On the way, Bao Yu encounters Little Princess and falls in love with her, not knowing that she is hiding a secret plot….

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: Kuo, a police's son, blames his father for his mother's death. He has no job, spends time in night clubs and always gets into fights. One night, Kuo rescues Mei from being raped and they become friends. Kuo wants to support Mei and her family so he goes gambling hoping to gain more money but bad luck seems to be following them with tragic outcomes.

programme.title: Brothers Five
programme.desc: The five Kao brothers, separated since birth, are unaware that the master of Teng Lung Manor has killed their father. All five however, vow to defeat the vicious gangsters at the manor due to their bullying ways. After reuniting and with much discipline and hard work, the Kaos are prepared to face Lung and his gang.

programme.title: Pale Passion
programme.desc: Fa is an obsessive man who loves his wife Ah Hsia but is easily jealous and abuses her. When she leaves him one day, Fa hooks up with another woman, Hsing. A deadly triangle develops when Fa runs into Ah Hsia again and decides to win her back….

programme.title: The Reckless Cricket
programme.desc: Inspired by “Drunken Master”, this kung fu comedy features a bumbling martial artist creating a cricket-style fighting arts to fight and defeat the different martial artists who have beaten him before.

programme.title: The House Of 72 Tenants
programme.desc: The 72 inhabitants of a dilapidated tenement live under the thumb of a heartless landlady and her sleazy husband. The arrival of a defiant new tenant however, changes their fate. The residents pool their resources together to prevent evictions, deflect targeted harassment by a corrupt policeman and ultimately prevent their home from being sold.

programme.title: Come Drink with Me
programme.desc: The brother of the mystery swordswoman "Golden Swallow” is kidnapped. She joins forces with a beggar “Drunken Cat” who is skilled in martial arts to free her brother from a Buddhist monastery run by a corrupt abbot. The film was selected as Hong Kong's entry for the Best Foreign Language Film at the 39th Academy Awards.

programme.title: Hong Kong Nocturne
programme.desc: This joyous, raucous, & colorful tunefest showcases the little seen dancing talents of celebrated kung-fu swordswoman Cheng Pei-Pei, as one of 3 girls dancing their way to the top.

programme.title: The Kid With A Tattoo
programme.desc: Young Bao Tong witnesses the brutal murder of his kung fu master by a vicious villain. A large eagle tattoo on Bao's chest was spotted by the killer as he escapes. Can Bao escape from the killer?

programme.title: The Butterfly Chalice
programme.desc: In the Ming Dynasty, scholar Tian Yu Chuan defends a fisherman's honour but accidentally kills the governor's son, driving him into exile. Pursued to the river's edge, he is rescued by the fisherman's daughter. Amid danger, love blossoms between them, and Tian seals their bond with his family heirloom, the Butterfly Chalice.

programme.title: The Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: Fans of the international star Alexander Fu Sheng were aghast. Their idol had broken both his legs and was recuperating. Everyone wondered: would he be able to return to the action comedies for which he was so famous? This movie was the answer, and it left no doubt that he had made a full recovery. Liu Chia-yung, brother of preeminent martial arts moviemaker Liu Chia-liang, was famous in his own right for kung-fu comedies, and he out-did himself with this one. Imagine Bob Hope and Bing Crosby with the skills of Jet Li and Jackie Chan, and you've got an idea of the fun and fury inherent in this delightful tale of two con men vying for a horde of hidden gold. Add to the mix a Shaolin monk (played by "Master Killer" Gordon Liu Chia-hui), a powerfully brutal villain, and his equally dangerous mute sister (future director Yang Tsing-tsing), and you've got one of the most internationally loved kung-fu capers ever made.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, the squad of lifeguards go on a mission to prove that you don't have to wear a badge to save the bay.

programme.title: Margot At The Wedding
programme.desc: An unflinchingly honest story of a family in distress. Stars Nicole Kidman and Jack Black.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: When a successful executive suffers a crisis of confidence and his career is at stake, he finds the solution to his problems in his daughter's imaginary world.

programme.title: Tom And Jerry
programme.desc: When Jerry moves into the best hotel in New York on the eve of the wedding of the century, the event planner hires Tom to get rid of him. However, the ensuing cat and mouse battle threatens to destroy her career, the wedding and possibly the hotel.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: The story before Snow White: During the war between two queens, the huntsman must vanquish the evil queen before her wickedness rules for eternity.

programme.title: Angus, Thongs And Perfect Snogging
programme.desc: Eccentric but loveable 14 year-old Georgia Nicolson tries to overcome the trials and tribulations of growing up.

programme.title: The Astronaut
programme.desc: After returning from her first space mission, astronaut Sam Walker fears that something extraterrestrial has followed her back to Earth.

programme.title: Novocaine
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams is taken hostage, Nathan turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected strength in the fight to get her back.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Euphoria follows a group of high school students as they navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: Danny is thrilled when The Company pulls him back in the field, but only to train Gen Z newcomer Wihlborg, a prodigy assassin with an attitude.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: With the 70s behind him, San Diego's top rated newsman, Ron Burgundy, returns to take New York's first 24-hour news channel by storm.

programme.title: Rob Peace
programme.desc: The true story of Robert Peace who grew up in New Jersey, the son of a convicted murderer, and defied the odds and went to Yale on a full scholarship. But at age 30, his bright future was ended by the bullet of a rival gang dealer.

programme.title: Into The Wild
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette and the Smurfs team up with new friends to save Papa Smurf after he's kidnapped and realize their destiny is to protect the universe.
